name: Big Tower Tiny Square
author: Poki
description: Big Tower Tiny Square is a puzzle platform game in which you're a square-shaped character who is on an exciting multi-level platform filled with dangerous traps and obstacles. You don't save a princess in this game, you only save your favorite pineapple! Dodge bullets, leap lava pits, unlock checkpoints, and wall-jump your way up the perilous Big Tower in this adventure that requires quick reflexes and high precision. Inspired by single-screen arcade games, Big Tower Tiny Square promises to give you an unforgettable experience if you're patient. Are you ready to jump… a lot? How to play Big Tower Tiny Square? Move - A/D or Left/Right arrow keys Jump - Space or Up arrow Restart - Y Who created Big Tower Tiny Square? Big Tower Tiny Square was created by EO Interactive. Play their other arcade game on Poki: Big NEON Tower VS Tiny Square How can I play Big Tower Tiny Square for free? You can play Big Tower Tiny Square for free on Poki. Can I play Big Tower Tiny Square on mobile devices and desktop? Big Tower Tiny Square can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
